source_document: DG ENER Technical Study 2020, Annex D (detailed service catalogue); Delegated Regulation (EU) 2020/2155 Annex VI
verification_note: Nazwy, kody, liczba i podział poziomów funkcjonalności NIE zostały zweryfikowane względem oficjalnego Annex D (pakiet Excel EC, dostępny wyłącznie przez formularz EUSurvey + akceptację warunków). Kody typu H-01 są wewnętrzne Rentgen, nie oficjalne (oficjalne to np. 'Heating-1a'). Brak macierzy impact scores i wag. Nie używać do liczenia SRI do czasu weryfikacji. Szczegóły: docs/sri/VALIDATION-GAP-PLAN.md.

services.official_name_en: Heat emission control
services.purpose_en: Regulate heat delivery to occupied spaces according to demand.
services.when_applicable_en: When space heating emitters (radiators, floor heating, fan coils) are present.

services.official_name_en: Emission control for TABS
services.purpose_en: Control thermally activated building structures for heating.
services.when_applicable_en: When TABS (concrete core activation) is installed.

services.official_name_en: Control of distribution fluid temperature (heating network)
services.official_name_pl: Sterowanie temperaturą medium w sieci grzewczej
services.purpose_en: Match distribution temperature to building load (weather compensation).
services.when_applicable_en: When hydronic or air heating distribution exists.

services.official_name_en: Control of distribution pumps in heating networks
services.official_name_pl: Sterowanie pompami obiegowymi w instalacji grzewczej
services.purpose_en: Optimize pump energy via speed or on/off control aligned with demand.
services.when_applicable_en: When circulation pumps serve heating distribution.

services.official_name_en: Heat generator control
services.purpose_en: Modulate heat production to match building demand.
services.when_applicable_en: When boilers, heat pumps or district heat substations are present.

services.official_name_en: Heat generation control (heat pumps)
services.purpose_en: Advanced control of heat pump operation including bivalent and hybrid modes.
services.when_applicable_en: When heat pumps provide space heating.
standards_basis: DG ENER study — extended FL for HP

services.official_name_en: Control of thermal energy storage operation (heating)
services.purpose_en: Charge/discharge thermal storage aligned with demand and tariffs.
services.when_applicable_en: When buffer tanks or seasonal storage (excluding TABS) exist.

services.official_name_en: Sequencing of different heat generators
services.purpose_en: Optimally switch between multiple heat sources.
services.when_applicable_en: When more than one heat generator is installed (mutually exclusive operation).

services.official_name_en: Flexibility of heat source control
services.purpose_en: Time-shift or remote control of heating for grid or tariff response.
services.when_applicable_en: When heating can participate in demand response.

services.official_name_en: Report information regarding heating performance
services.purpose_en: Inform occupants/operators about heating operation and status.
services.when_applicable_en: When heating systems exist and reporting is feasible.

services.official_name_en: Control of DHW storage charging (direct electric heating or integrated electric HP)
services.official_name_pl: Sterowanie ładowaniem zasobnika CWU (grzałka lub wbudowana pompa)
services.purpose_en: Optimize DHW charging from electric resistance or integrated HP.
services.when_applicable_en: When electric DHW storage or HP-integrated DHW exists.

services.official_name_en: Control of DHW storage charging (using hot water generation)
services.official_name_pl: Sterowanie ładowaniem zasobnika CWU (wytwarzanie ciepłej wody)
services.purpose_en: Control DHW charging from boiler or central heat generator.
services.when_applicable_en: When DHW is produced via boiler/central plant.

services.official_name_en: Control of DHW storage charging (solar collector and supplementary heat generation)
services.official_name_pl: Sterowanie ładowaniem CWU (kolektor słoneczny + źródło uzupełniające)
services.purpose_en: Prioritize solar DHW with backup heat source control.
services.when_applicable_en: When solar thermal DHW with backup exists.

services.official_name_en: Sequencing in case of different DHW generators
services.purpose_en: Select optimal DHW generator among multiple sources.
services.when_applicable_en: When multiple DHW generation paths exist.

services.official_name_en: Report information regarding domestic hot water performance
services.official_name_pl: Raportowanie informacji o pracy instalacji CWU
services.purpose_en: Report DHW temperatures, consumption and faults to users.
services.when_applicable_en: When DHW system is present.

services.official_name_en: Cooling emission control
services.purpose_en: Regulate cooling delivery to spaces based on demand.
services.when_applicable_en: When cooling emitters (FCU, chilled ceilings, etc.) exist.

services.official_name_en: Emission control for TABS (cooling mode)
services.purpose_en: Control TABS for cooling operation.
services.when_applicable_en: When TABS used for cooling.

services.official_name_en: Generator control for cooling
services.purpose_en: Modulate chillers/ cooling plant to match load.
services.when_applicable_en: When mechanical cooling plant exists.

services.official_name_en: Control of distribution network chilled water temperature
services.official_name_pl: Sterowanie temperaturą wody chłodniczej w sieci
services.purpose_en: Optimize supply/return chilled water temperature.
services.when_applicable_en: When chilled water distribution exists.

services.official_name_en: Control of distribution pumps in cooling networks
services.purpose_en: Variable pumping aligned with cooling demand.
services.when_applicable_en: When cooling circulation pumps exist.

services.official_name_en: Control of thermal energy storage operation (cooling)
services.purpose_en: Ice/water TES charging for load shifting.
services.when_applicable_en: When cooling thermal storage is installed.

services.official_name_en: Interlock: prevention of simultaneous heating and cooling in zones
services.official_name_pl: Blokada jednoczesnego ogrzewania i chłodzenia w strefach
services.purpose_en: Avoid energy waste from concurrent heating/cooling.
services.when_applicable_en: When both heating and cooling can serve same zones.

services.official_name_en: Sequencing of different cooling generators
services.purpose_en: Switch between chillers, free cooling, etc.
services.when_applicable_en: When multiple cooling sources exist.

services.official_name_en: Flexibility of cooling system control
services.purpose_en: Time-shift or remote cooling for DSM/grid signals.
services.when_applicable_en: When cooling participates in demand response.

services.official_name_en: Report information regarding cooling performance
services.purpose_en: Inform users about cooling operation and efficiency.
services.when_applicable_en: When cooling systems exist.

services.official_name_en: Supply air flow control at room level
services.official_name_pl: Sterowanie przepływem powietrza nawiewanego w pomieszczeniu
services.purpose_en: Adjust ventilation flow per room based on need.
services.when_applicable_en: When room-level VAV or similar exists.

services.official_name_en: Air flow or pressure control at the AHU level
services.official_name_pl: Sterowanie przepływem/ciśnieniem na poziomie centrali wentylacyjnej
services.purpose_en: Optimize AHU fan and duct pressure.
services.when_applicable_en: When central AHU serves building.

services.official_name_en: Heat recovery control: prevention of overheating
services.purpose_en: Protect heat recovery from summer overheating bypass.
services.when_applicable_en: When HRU is installed.

services.official_name_en: Supply air temperature control at the AHU
services.official_name_pl: Sterowanie temperaturą powietrza nawiewanego w centrali
services.purpose_en: Condition supply air temperature efficiently.
services.when_applicable_en: When AHU includes heating/cooling coils.

services.official_name_en: Free cooling with mechanical ventilation system
services.official_name_pl: Free cooling z wykorzystaniem mechanicznej wentylacji
services.purpose_en: Use outdoor air for cooling when conditions allow.
services.when_applicable_en: When AHU supports economizer/free cooling.

services.official_name_en: Monitoring of indoor air quality
services.purpose_en: Ventilate based on CO₂, VOC or particulate sensors.
services.when_applicable_en: When DCV or IAQ-based control is feasible.

services.official_name_en: Occupancy control for indoor lighting
services.official_name_pl: Sterowanie oświetleniem w zależności od obecności
services.purpose_en: Switch lighting based on presence detection.
services.when_applicable_en: When artificial lighting exists in occupied zones.

services.official_name_en: Automatic control of artificial lighting based on daylight availability
services.official_name_pl: Automatyczne sterowanie oświetleniem w zależności od światła dziennego
services.purpose_en: Dim or switch lighting using daylight harvesting.
services.when_applicable_en: When daylight reaches occupied areas.

services.official_name_en: Window solar shading control
services.purpose_en: Automate blinds/shading for solar gain and glare control.
services.when_applicable_en: When movable shading devices are present.

services.official_name_en: Window opening/closing control combined with HVAC
services.official_name_pl: Sterowanie otwieraniem okien z integracją HVAC
services.purpose_en: Coordinate natural ventilation windows with HVAC interlocks.
services.when_applicable_en: When automated windows or vents exist.

services.official_name_en: Report information regarding dynamic building envelope performance
services.purpose_en: Inform users about shading/window operation and impact.
services.when_applicable_en: When dynamic envelope elements exist.

services.official_name_en: Report information regarding local electricity generation
services.purpose_en: Report PV/other on-site generation to occupants/operators.
services.when_applicable_en: When local generation is installed.

services.official_name_en: Storage of locally produced electricity
services.purpose_en: Store PV surplus in batteries or other storage.
services.when_applicable_en: When electrical storage coupled to generation exists.

services.official_name_en: Report information regarding electricity consumption
services.purpose_en: Provide granular electricity use feedback.
services.when_applicable_en: When metering/sub-metering exists.

services.official_name_en: Optimization of electricity produced for own consumption
services.purpose_en: Maximize self-consumption of on-site generation.
services.when_applicable_en: When PV and controllable loads coexist.

services.official_name_en: Control of combined heat and power (CHP) installation
services.purpose_en: Operate CHP aligned with heat and electricity demand.
services.when_applicable_en: When CHP is installed.

services.official_name_en: Report information regarding energy storage
services.purpose_en: Report SOC, cycles and storage performance.
services.when_applicable_en: When electrical/thermal storage reporting is available.

services.official_name_en: Support microgrid operation mode
services.purpose_en: Islanded or coordinated microgrid operation.
services.when_applicable_en: When microgrid architecture is implemented.

services.official_name_en: EV charging capacity
services.purpose_en: Provide and manage EV charging infrastructure capacity.
services.when_applicable_en: When EV charging points are present or planned (triage).

services.official_name_en: Scheduled load balancing of EV charging network
services.purpose_en: Shift EV charging to off-peak or renewable surplus.
services.when_applicable_en: When multiple EVSE or smart charging exists.

services.official_name_en: Provision of information on EV charging
services.purpose_en: Inform users about charging status, cost and availability.
services.when_applicable_en: When EV charging is available.

services.official_name_en: Central reporting of TBS performance and energy consumption
services.official_name_pl: Centralne raportowanie pracy TBS i zużycia energii
services.purpose_en: Unified visibility of all technical building systems.
services.when_applicable_en: When BMS or central monitoring exists.

services.official_name_en: Smart grid integration (harmonisation between TBS)
services.purpose_en: Coordinate building systems for grid-friendly operation.
services.when_applicable_en: When grid interface or aggregator connection exists.

services.official_name_en: Single platform for automatic control and coordination between TBS
services.official_name_pl: Jedna platforma automatycznego sterowania i koordynacji TBS
services.purpose_en: Orchestrate HVAC, lighting, envelope from one platform.
services.when_applicable_en: When integrated BMS/BACS platform exists.

services.official_name_en: Time scheduling of HVAC systems
services.purpose_en: Program HVAC operation by occupancy calendar.
services.when_applicable_en: When schedulable HVAC exists.

services.official_name_en: Detection of faults in TBS and support for diagnosis
services.official_name_pl: Wykrywanie usterek TBS i wsparcie diagnostyki
services.purpose_en: FDD and maintenance support across systems.
services.when_applicable_en: When monitoring data enables fault detection.

services.official_name_en: Occupancy detection linked to services
services.official_name_pl: Detekcja obecności powiązana z usługami budynku
services.purpose_en: Use occupancy to drive heating, lighting and ventilation.
services.when_applicable_en: When building-wide occupancy sensing exists.

services.official_name_en: Report information on demand-side management (DSM) performance
services.purpose_en: Report load shifting and DSM outcomes.
services.when_applicable_en: When DSM strategies are implemented.

services.official_name_en: Optimization of energy flows according to occupancy, weather and grid signals
services.official_name_pl: Optymalizacja przepływów energii wg obecności, pogody i sygnałów sieci
services.purpose_en: Holistic optimization across systems and external signals.
services.when_applicable_en: When advanced BMS/EMS with external data exists.
